Design plus dev in house
Your business goals, our roadmap

The flow from idea to summit

Every client follows the same simple climb. We meet you where you are and walk the whole way up.

Step 1

Validate the idea

Shape a clear concept and prototype to test with real users.

Step 2

Launch the product

Ship a polished design and working build that earns trust fast.

Step 3

Win more customers

Optimize conversion with high-performing pages and flows.

Step 4

Scale with confidence

Grow on a solid design system and codebase built to last.

What we do

Design and development, under one roof

No handoffs, no finger pointing. One team that designs the experience and ships the code.

UI / UX Design

Product design that feels effortless.

We turn fuzzy ideas into clear, beautiful product experiences. Research, flows, wireframes, and a polished design system your team can build on.

  • User research and flows
  • Wireframes and prototypes
  • High fidelity UI
  • Design system and tokens
from $4kStart here

Web Design + Development

Sites and web apps that convert.

Fast, modern websites and web apps built to win clients. Clean code, great performance, and a design that earns trust on the first scroll.

  • Marketing sites and web apps
  • Responsive front end build
  • CMS and integrations
  • SEO and performance
from $6kStart here

Mobile App Design + Build

Apps people love to open.

From first sketch to App Store. We design and build mobile experiences that feel native, smooth, and ready to scale with your growth.

  • iOS and Android design
  • Cross platform build
  • API and backend wiring
  • Launch and iteration
from $9kStart here

How we work

A clear, friendly climb

No mystery, no jargon. You always know what is happening and what comes next.

01

Discovery

We start with a free call to understand your goals, users, and timeline.

02

Design

We map flows and craft a warm, polished interface you can feel proud of.

03

Build

We turn design into fast, clean, production-ready code.

04

Launch + Scale

We ship, measure, and keep improving as you grow toward the summit.

Client recommendations

5 star reviews from happy clients

4.9
Based on Google reviews
About the studio

Founded by a designer who codes

Launch Peak Studio started with a simple belief. Great products come from one team that both designs and builds. Tatiana Rogel leads the work, and a small, sharp crew brings it to life.

We are friendly enough that a first time founder feels welcome, and polished enough that a funded company trusts us with the whole thing.

Human first

We listen closely and treat your product like our own.

Crafted

Every pixel and line of code gets care and polish.

Global ready

Portland based, working with teams all over the world.

Tatiana Rogel
Founder, Design + Dev

UI/UX designer and web/mobile developer who loves taking founders from idea to launch.

Maya Linden
Product Designer

Turns research into clean, friendly interfaces that feel effortless to use.

Ava Brooks
Frontend Engineer

Builds fast, accessible interfaces with pixel-perfect care and motion.

Nora Hayes
Strategy + Growth

Connects design work to real business goals and measurable outcomes.

Questions

Good things to know

Most projects are fixed scope with clear ranges. Design starts from $4k, web from $6k, and mobile from $9k. We send a simple proposal after our discovery call.

A focused landing page can take two weeks. A full product design and build usually runs six to twelve weeks depending on scope.

Yes. We are based in Portland, Oregon and work with clients across the US and around the world. Async friendly and timezone flexible.

Friendly, clear, and fast. You get one partner who designs and builds, weekly updates, and no jargon. We treat your product like our own.

Let us climb together

Start your project today

Tell us a little about your idea or book a free 30 minute discovery call. No pressure, no jargon, just a friendly chat about what you want to build.

Book a free discovery call
